rationale: Tests if relative momentum divergence between semiconductors and software flags early institutional rotation in broad tech leadership.
expected_failure_mode: Sub-sector correlations converge during macro liquidations, wiping out granular lead time.
stop_conditions: quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Tracking error relative to TECL buy-and-hold during uptrends exceeds 15%.
Alpha contribution drops to zero across non-overlapping 3-year windows.
